author: Igor Muzyka
message:
Added support for @main attribute based scripts (#194)

* Added support for @main attribute based scripts, included async-main-count-lines Example

* removed unnecessary manual #warning

* Improved Package.swift manifest file creation

* Minor improvements

* Update Sources/Command/edit().swift

Applying changes suggested by @Amzd for Swift <= 5.5

Co-authored-by: Casper Zandbergen <info@casperzandbergen.nl>

* Fix compilation in older Swifts

---------

Co-authored-by: Max Howell <mxcl@me.com>

author: wti
message:
Support XDG_CACHE_HOME environment variable on all platforms.

Use platform defaults when XDG_CACHE_HOME is not available.
This enables macOS users to change the cache directory location.

author: wti
message:
5.8 version fixes: ignore stderr, fix regexp, update static versions

Swift-driver now emits version also to stderr, mixing with script output
fix: Ignore stderr.

Swift-driver emits "swift-driver version ..." instead of "swift version"
fix: Start regular expression with " version ...".

Existing fall-back #if swift(..) versions ran only to 5.3.
fix: Include all up to 5.8.

No tests.

author: Max Howell
message:
Merge pull request #184 from wti/fix_CI_cardsToInk

Cards example no longer available - replace with Ink

author: wti
message:
Replace cards example since missing & required for tests

NSHipster cards are not on github any more.

Replace with Sundell's Ink package, because:
- it has many stars, so maybe less likely to disappear
- it requires no privileges that break CI
- it demos easily
- it has no dependencies
    - Chalk already demos transitivie dependencies

Replace example script and doc, and update test.
